creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Can you test the following two patches from upstream and let me know if that resolves the issue:

https://bitbucket.org/tiran/pykeccak/commits/22c72e617275ddb7a228ad2777558366ae21dea6

https://bitbucket.org/tiran/pykeccak/commits/fd8c17b3cd973f0dc5d6591a03cb9abf7b971599

Please also provide details of how you are building the py-sha3 port without threads
